title: limonium cossonianum
intro: Limonium cossonianum, also known as Corsican sea lavender, is a flowering plant species in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Limonium cossonianum include its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to treat various health conditions.
